creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
The use of a non-fc4 value in USE_LINUX (or OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT)
	causes an IGNORE to come up when AUTOMATIC_PLIST is set in a linux
	port.  This patch will correct the issue when fc6, f7, or f8 are used.

How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to install audio/linux-alsa-lib with the current bsd.linux-rpm.mk
	when OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT is set to fc6, f7, or f8.
